English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Lane Cooper papers
Cooper, Lane, 1875-1959.
14-12-680
9.1 cubic feet. 9.1 cubic feet.
1881-1959. Correspondence, Manuscripts, Printed Materials Personal and professional correspondence, manuscripts, notes, reviews, printed material, and other items. Collection material in English 2087803
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 1966
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, June 2009
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, January 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of English language and literature, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Personal and professional correspondence, manuscripts, notes, reviews, printed material, and other items.
Includes correspondence with his father, Jacob Cooper of Rutgers University, and his mother; letters from students, academic colleagues, and others discussing problems encountered in teaching and study, literary matters, Cooper's and others' published works, the activities of the Concordance Society, and related topics. Correspondents include Albert S. Cook, Drury Cooper, Will Cooper, Mary L. Cooper, Charles G. Osgood, Harry Caplan, Marjorie Barstow Greenbie, Caroline Whipple Phillips, and many others. Also, manuscripts and notes for Cooper's publications; draft reviews; students' papers; correspondence and notes regarding Cooper's LOUIS AGASSIZ AS A TEACHER (1917); autobiographical notes; a notebook of quotations and comments; Cooper family genealogy and photographs; and printed material. Also, letters to Ralph A. Liddle, and material pertaining to the Lane Cooper Scholarship Fund.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Correspondence
Series II. Assorted Files
Cite As:
Lane Cooper papers, #14-12-680. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Detailed PDF guide available upon request.
Photographs. Genealogies. College teachers. English literature -- Study and teaching. English language -- Study and teaching. Agassiz, Louis, 1807-1873. Caplan, Harry, 1896-1980. Liddle, Ralph A. Cook, Albert S. Cooper, Drury. Cooper, Jacob, 1830-1904. Cooper, Mary L. Cooper, Will. Greenbie, Marjorie Latta Barstow, 1891- Osgood, Charles Grosvenor, 1871-1964. Phillips, Caroline Whipple. Cooper family. Concordance Society Cornell University. English Department Cornell University -- : Faculty. Cornell University. Lane Cooper Scholarship Fund
